fixes_applied.description: Replaced page.locator(print_history_page.elements.billing_cycle_period_card).screenshot() with print_history_page.billing_cycle_period_card.screenshot() - removed inline page.locator() wrapping of POM elements reference

Replaced expect(page.locator(print_history_page.elements.billing_cycle_period_card)).to_be_visible() with expect(print_history_page.billing_cycle_period_card).to_be_visible() - removed inline page.locator() wrapping of POM elements reference

Added actual __init__ implementation code to page_additions file showing how to convert Elements class string selectors to Locator properties. Added 12 lines of self.locator_name = page.locator(self.elements.locator_name) initialization code.

Added enrollment success verification after EnrollmentHelper.finish_enrollment(). Created ConfirmationPage instance and added expect(confirmation_page.success_message).to_be_visible(timeout=30000) assertion. Also added import for ConfirmationPage.

Added tooltip content verification for complimentary pages in Step 7. After reading tooltip_text, added assertion: assert 'complimentary' in tooltip_text.lower() or 'pages' in tooltip_text.lower() to verify tooltip contains expected keywords.

Added tooltip content verification for additional pages in Step 16. After reading tooltip_text, added assertion: assert 'additional' in tooltip_text.lower() or 'pages' in tooltip_text.lower() or 'block' in tooltip_text.lower() to verify tooltip contains expected additional pages keywords.

Implemented missing pause_subscription() method in GeminiRAHelper. Created helper_additions/gemini_ra_helper_additions.py with pause_subscription() static method that accesses edit menu, selects paused state, and saves changes. Updated test script to call GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription(page) in Precondition 4.

Replaced non-standard expect().not_to_be_empty() assertion with standard Python assert. Changed from expect(print_history_page.complimentary_pages_tooltip).not_to_be_empty(timeout=10000) to tooltip_text = print_history_page.complimentary_pages_tooltip.text_content() followed by assert len(tooltip_text) > 0.

Encapsulated admin workflow sequence into single helper method. Created GeminiRAHelper.shift_time_and_trigger_billing(page, tenant_email, days) method in helper_additions file. Replaced inline sequence of GeminiRAHelper.access() → access_tenant_page() → event_shift() with single call to shift_time_and_trigger_billing(page, tenant_email, days=32) in Step 3.

Added pixel tolerance to progress bar width comparison in Step 18. Replaced exact pixel comparison (assert bar_width == parent_width) with tolerance-based comparison: convert widths to float, calculate absolute difference, assert abs(bar_width_px - parent_width_px) <= 1 to handle sub-pixel rendering differences.

new_files_created.reason: Created to implement missing GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription() method (V007) and encapsulate admin workflow into shift_time_and_trigger_billing() method (V009)

post_fix_summary.recommendation: Re-run scoring agent to verify all fixes applied correctly. All violations have been successfully addressed: removed inline page.locator() wrapping (V001, V002), added __init__ implementation to page_additions (V003), added missing assertions (V004, V005, V006), implemented missing helper methods (V007, V009), replaced non-standard assertions (V008), and added pixel tolerance for robust comparison (V010).
